attributes.description: Pod monitoring with memory decomposition, OOM risk thresholds, container restart trends, and network I/O.

embeddableConfig.description: Navigation links to other K8s dashboards.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
  AND @timestamp > ?_tend - 5 minutes
| STATS
    cpu_usage        = AVG(k8s.pod.cpu.usage),
    memory_ws        = AVG(k8s.pod.memory.working_set),
    phase_num        = LAST(k8s.pod.phase, CASE(k8s.pod.phase IS NOT NULL, @timestamp, NULL)),
    restarts         = MAX(k8s.container.restarts),
    k8s.node.name    = MV_FIRST(VALUES(k8s.node.name)),
    k8s.cluster.name = MV_FIRST(VALUES(k8s.cluster.name)),
    mem_limit        = MAX(k8s.container.memory_limit),
    last_seen        = MAX(@timestamp)
  BY k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.name
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
| EVAL
    phase = CASE(
      phase_num == 1, "Pending",
      phase_num == 2, "Running",
      phase_num == 3, "Succeeded",
      phase_num == 4, "Failed",
      "Unknown"),
    restarts = COALESCE(restarts, 0),
    mem_limit_util = CASE(
      mem_limit IS NOT NULL AND mem_limit > 0,
        ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(memory_ws) / TO_DOUBLE(mem_limit), 4),
      NULL)
| KEEP k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.name, phase, cpu_usage, memory_ws, mem_limit_util, restarts, k8s.node.name
| SORT cpu_usage DESC NULLS LAST, k8s.pod.name ASC

FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
  AND @timestamp > ?_tend - 5 minutes
| STATS
    cpu_usage        = AVG(k8s.pod.cpu.usage),
    memory_ws        = AVG(k8s.pod.memory.working_set),
    phase_num        = LAST(k8s.pod.phase, CASE(k8s.pod.phase IS NOT NULL, @timestamp, NULL)),
    restarts         = MAX(k8s.container.restarts),
    k8s.node.name    = MV_FIRST(VALUES(k8s.node.name)),
    k8s.cluster.name = MV_FIRST(VALUES(k8s.cluster.name)),
    mem_limit        = MAX(k8s.container.memory_limit),
    last_seen        = MAX(@timestamp)
  BY k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.name
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
| EVAL
    phase = CASE(
      phase_num == 1, "Pending",
      phase_num == 2, "Running",
      phase_num == 3, "Succeeded",
      phase_num == 4, "Failed",
      "Unknown"),
    restarts = COALESCE(restarts, 0),
    mem_limit_util = CASE(
      mem_limit IS NOT NULL AND mem_limit > 0,
        ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(memory_ws) / TO_DOUBLE(mem_limit), 4),
      NULL)
| KEEP k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.name, phase, cpu_usage, memory_ws, mem_limit_util, restarts, k8s.node.name
| SORT cpu_usage DESC NULLS LAST, k8s.pod.name ASC

embeddableConfig.description:
All pods across all clusters, ranked by container restarts (highest first). 

Click a pod name to drill into pod details, a namespace to drill into namespace details, a node to drill into node details, or a cluster to drill into cluster details. 

Phase reflects the latest collected value. CPU utilization, memory working set and memory utilization are averaged over the selected time range. 

Container restarts = sum across all containers over the selected time range.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
| STATS last_seen = MAX(@timestamp) BY k8s.pod.uid
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
| STATS pod_count = COUNT(*)

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
| STATS last_seen = MAX(@timestamp) BY k8s.pod.uid
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
| STATS pod_count = COUNT(*)

embeddableConfig.description: Total number of pods, based on distinct pod UIDs in the latest collected data for the selected time range.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.phase IS NOT NULL
| STATS current_phase = LAST(k8s.pod.phase, @timestamp),
        last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
  BY k8s.pod.uid
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
  AND current_phase == 2
| STATS running_count = COUNT(*)

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.phase IS NOT NULL
| STATS current_phase = LAST(k8s.pod.phase, @timestamp),
        last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
  BY k8s.pod.uid
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
  AND current_phase == 2
| STATS running_count = COUNT(*)

embeddableConfig.description: Number of running pods, based on distinct pod UIDs where the latest pod phase is Running (phase=2) in the most recent collected data for the selected time range.

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*

| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5

query.esql:
TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.namespace.name != ""
  AND k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.cpu.usage IS NOT NULL
| STATS `CPU usage` = MAX(k8s.pod.cpu.usage)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend),
     k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.name
| SORT timestamp ASC, `CPU usage` DESC
| LIMIT 10 BY timestamp
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.name, `CPU usage`

TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.namespace.name != ""
  AND k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.cpu.usage IS NOT NULL
| STATS `CPU usage` = MAX(k8s.pod.cpu.usage)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend),
     k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.name
| SORT timestamp ASC, `CPU usage` DESC
| LIMIT 10 BY timestamp
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.name, `CPU usage`

embeddableConfig.description:
CPU usage per namespace (cores).

Shows the 10 namespaces consuming the most CPU.
embeddableConfig.title: Top 10 pods by CPU usage

query.esql:
TS metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.namespace.name != ""
  AND k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.container.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.container.restarts IS NOT NULL
| STATS max_restarts = MAX(k8s.container.restarts)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend),
     k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.name,
     k8s.pod.uid, k8s.container.name
| STATS total_restarts = SUM(max_restarts)
  BY timestamp, k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.name
| SORT timestamp ASC, total_restarts DESC
| LIMIT 10 BY timestamp
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.name, total_restarts

TS metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.namespace.name != ""
  AND k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.container.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.container.restarts IS NOT NULL
| STATS max_restarts = MAX(k8s.container.restarts)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend),
     k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.name,
     k8s.pod.uid, k8s.container.name
| STATS total_restarts = SUM(max_restarts)
  BY timestamp, k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.name
| SORT timestamp ASC, total_restarts DESC
| LIMIT 10 BY timestamp
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.name, total_restarts

embeddableConfig.description:
Container restarts per pod.

Shows the 10 pods with the most container restarts.
embeddableConfig.title: Top 10 pods by container restarts

query.esql:
TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.namespace.name != ""
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.memory.working_set IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    rss = MAX(k8s.pod.memory.rss),
    working_set = MAX(k8s.pod.memory.working_set),
    available = MAX(k8s.pod.memory.available)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend),
     k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.uid
| STATS
    rss = SUM(rss),
    working_set = SUM(working_set),
    available = SUM(available)
  BY timestamp
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, rss, working_set, available

TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.namespace.name != ""
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.memory.working_set IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    rss = MAX(k8s.pod.memory.rss),
    working_set = MAX(k8s.pod.memory.working_set),
    available = MAX(k8s.pod.memory.available)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend),
     k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.uid
| STATS
    rss = SUM(rss),
    working_set = SUM(working_set),
    available = SUM(available)
  BY timestamp
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, rss, working_set, available

embeddableConfig.description: Memory composition over time. RSS, working set, and available memory as separate series. SUM per 1m bucket.
embeddableConfig.title: Memory composition

TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""

  AND k8s.namespace.name != ""
  AND k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.memory.working_set IS NOT NULL

  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend),

| LIMIT 10 BY timestamp
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.name, `Memory working set`

TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""

| SORT timestamp ASC, `Memory working set` DESC
| LIMIT 10 BY timestamp
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.name, `Memory working set`

embeddableConfig.description:
Memory working set per namespace.

Shows the 10 namespaces consuming the most memory.
embeddableConfig.title: Top 10 pods by memory working set usage

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.phase IS NOT NULL
| STATS ph = LAST(k8s.pod.phase, @timestamp) BY k8s.pod.uid, ts = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| STATS
    col_total = COUNT(*),
    col_running = COUNT(*) WHERE ph == 2,
    col_pending = COUNT(*) WHERE ph == 1,
    col_failed = COUNT(*) WHERE ph == 4,
    col_succeeded = COUNT(*) WHERE ph == 3,
    col_unknown = COUNT(*) WHERE ph < 1 OR ph > 4
  BY ts
| SORT ts ASC

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.phase IS NOT NULL
| STATS ph = LAST(k8s.pod.phase, @timestamp) BY k8s.pod.uid, ts = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| STATS
    col_total = COUNT(*),
    col_running = COUNT(*) WHERE ph == 2,
    col_pending = COUNT(*) WHERE ph == 1,
    col_failed = COUNT(*) WHERE ph == 4,
    col_succeeded = COUNT(*) WHERE ph == 3,
    col_unknown = COUNT(*) WHERE ph < 1 OR ph > 4
  BY ts
| SORT ts ASC

embeddableConfig.description: Pod counts over time. The series includes total, running, pending, failed, succeeded, and unknown pod counts (distinct pod UIDs per bucket).
embeddableConfig.title: Pod counts over time

attributes.title: [Kubernetes OTel] Pods
